features.title: Track your brand
features.body: 30 to 300 brand-targeted prompts queried on ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity (+Mistral, Grok on Pro). See your average rank, citation rate, share-of-voice.

features.title: Compare with competitors
features.body: 6-LLM × N-competitor heatmap. Automatic detection of new entrants. Authority sources prioritized by cross-LLM citation frequency.

features.title: Improve your AI ranking
features.body: Actionable recommendations generated by Claude Haiku after each snapshot: sources to target, content gaps, competitor alerts. Instant email alerts.

problemStats.label: AI search YoY
problemStats.body: Search volumes processed by consumer LLMs in 2025 vs 2024. Source: Similarweb panel ChatGPT/Perplexity, Q1 2025.

problemStats.label: B2B purchases influenced
problemStats.body: B2B decision-makers who consult an LLM at least once during their vendor evaluation cycle. Source: Gartner 2025.

problemStats.label: EU-native monitoring tools
problemStats.body: LLM monitoring solutions hosted in EU and billed in EUR before Geoperf. Most competitors are US-based, USD-billed, outside strict GDPR.

audiences.use: Measures brand authority in LLMs. Identifies media sources to target via PR to lift average rank.
Checks weekly whether the brand is cited next to direct competitors. Alerts when a competitor gains visibility.
Tracks share-of-voice on prospect queries like "best data IT services firm in France". Briefs agencies with hard numbers.
Captures early adopters who discover tools via ChatGPT. Measures the impact of an editorial push (podcast, op-ed).

features.title: Track your brand
features.body: Enter your name, domain, category and 2-3 competitors. Geoperf generates 30 contextual prompts and runs the 1st snapshot immediately.

features.title: Compare with competitors
features.body: View your average rank, citation rate and share-of-voice against rivals in the responses of the 4 major LLMs. Detailed per-LLM heatmap (Pro+).

features.title: Improve your LLM SEO
features.body: Claude Haiku analyzes your snapshots and proposes 3 to 5 prioritized actions: authority sources to target, content gaps, competitor threats. Email alerts on every drift.

differentiators.title: 4 LLMs, in parallel
differentiators.body: Many GEO tools only query ChatGPT. Geoperf compares ChatGPT (GPT-4o), Claude Sonnet 4.6, Gemini 2.5 Pro and Perplexity Sonar in parallel — each has its own bias, what matters is their consensus.

differentiators.title: Actionable recommendations
differentiators.body: No opaque dashboard of numbers. Each snapshot ships with 3 to 5 concrete actions generated by Claude Haiku 4.5: which authority sources to target, what to publish, which competitors to watch.

differentiators.title: Data stored in Europe
differentiators.body: Hosted on Supabase Frankfurt. No data transfers to the US. GDPR-compliant, audit available on demand.

differentiators.title: Custom GEO audit included
differentiators.body: Geoperf is an extension of the Jourdechance consultancy. If automated results aren't enough, we offer a GEO consulting audit (reserved for Pro+ clients).

faqItems.a: The 1st snapshot runs in 30 seconds after brand creation. Haiku recommendations arrive ~10 seconds later. Continuous monitoring starts immediately.
GPT-4o (OpenAI), Claude Sonnet 4.6 (Anthropic), Gemini 2.5 Pro (Google), Perplexity Sonar Pro. The Free plan is limited to GPT-4o.
30 categorized French prompts (direct search, use-case, competitive) generated from your category and competitors. Templates published on GitHub.
Data hosted on Supabase Frankfurt. No personal data in prompts. Full GDPR audit on contractual demand.

sample.metaDescription: How ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude and Perplexity rank global asset management players in 2026. Geoperf study preview.

sample.heroTitleStart: How LLMs perceive the asset management industry
sample.heroSubtitle: Geoperf queried ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude and Perplexity in parallel. Here are the {total} firms that at least one model spontaneously cites, ranked by inter-LLM consensus.
sample.methodNote: The AI visibility score ranges from 1 (cited by a single model — fragile perception) to 4 (cited by all four — universal consensus). The higher the score, the more durably the brand dominates generative perception.
sample.topTitle: The quartet that dominates AI perception
sample.topCallout: The full study covers all {total} identified firms, breaks down per-model biases (Gemini over-represents US-listed firms), and proposes 5 actionable recommendations to improve your AI score.

Market dynamics, geography, ESG and asset/liability trends.

Per firm: AI positioning, cited sources, score, country.
Concrete recommendations for CMOs and Heads of Brand.

about.metaDescription: Geoperf measures and improves your brand visibility in LLMs. One method, four models, undeniable numbers.
about.heroTitle: Measure what AIs say about your brand
about.heroSubtitle: ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude and Perplexity have become the new entry point for B2B decisions. Yet, no tool measured how these models describe your brand. Geoperf fills that gap.
about.methodP1: For each industry studied, Geoperf queries the four major LLMs in parallel with an identical structured prompt: "Which are the major firms in this industry in 2026?"
about.methodP2Before: Responses are consolidated, deduplicated and scored: each firm gets an
about.methodP2After: from 0 to 4 — the number of models that cite it spontaneously. That score structures our studies.
about.methodP3: The result: an honest, reproducible inter-LLM benchmark that reveals what no classic SEO tool measures: generative perception.
about.behindP1After: , a French company founded in 2018 and based in Boulogne-Billancourt. Jourdechance has been advising B2B brands for eight years on digital and data strategy.
about.behindP2: Geoperf was born in 2026 from this observation: marketing directors invest massively in classic SEO but have no visibility on their generative ranking, even though LLMs are becoming the main interface for professional information search.
about.audience1: looking for a concrete benchmark of their AI visibility versus competitors.
about.audience2Strong: Heads of Brand and Heads of Communications
about.audience2: measuring brand equity who want to extend their reading to new surfaces.
about.audience3: watching classic SEO lose ground and looking for the next organic acquisition lever.
about.ctaFinalSubtitle: Want the study covering your industry? Or a personalized audit of your AI positioning?

saasFaq.metaDescription: Geoperf FAQ: tested LLMs, prompts, GDPR, cancellation, GEO audit, SEO/GEO difference, security, sub-processors.
saasFaq.title: Frequently asked questions
saasFaq.intro: {count} questions, grouped in 4 categories. Not finding your answer? Write to us:

items.a: Geoperf is a French SaaS for monitoring brand visibility in LLMs (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity). You track weekly whether your brand is cited and at which rank when a prospect queries an LLM about your sector. Edited by Jourdechance SAS, hosted in Frankfurt (EU), billed in EUR.

items.q: What is GEO and how does it differ from SEO?
items.a: SEO (Search Engine Optimization) optimizes your ranking on classic search engines (Google, Bing). GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) optimizes your visibility in LLM-generated answers. SEO works on clickable links; GEO works on brands cited in the answer text. Both are complementary, but GEO becomes critical as LLMs replace part of Google's B2B queries.

Because your B2B prospects use ChatGPT and Perplexity as their first vendor research source (Gartner 2025: 1 in 3 decision-makers consult an LLM during their evaluation cycle). If your brand isn't cited, you're invisible — and you don't know it, because no traditional analytics captures that type of query.

items.q: How does it differ from a GEO consulting audit?
items.a: Geoperf SaaS is a continuous monitoring tool (you see the numbers). A Jourdechance GEO audit is a human consulting engagement: we analyze your media ecosystem in depth + recommend a 6-12 month action plan (authority PR, content, Wikipedia partnerships, etc.). The audit is included for Pro and Agency clients, or available standalone via /contact.

Our target: French SMBs and mid-market companies of 50-500 employees, primarily B2B. Typical profiles: digital agency CMOs, B2B SaaS scale-up Heads of Marketing, mid-market IT services Communication Directors, B2B fintech founders. If you have an active marketing budget and Google competition, you probably also have LLM competition.

Geoperf queries GPT-4o (OpenAI), Claude Sonnet 4.6 (Anthropic), Gemini 2.5 Pro (Google) and Perplexity Sonar Pro in parallel. The Free plan is limited to GPT-4o to control costs; Solo, Pro and Agency plans cover all 4 models. LLMs are accessed via OpenRouter for output and cost consistency.

30 prompts in French, split in 3 categories: 10 direct sector search prompts, 10 use-case prompts, 10 competitive prompts. Templates are public (saas/prompts/brand_monitoring/ on GitHub) and personalized from your category + 2-3 competitors you provide.

items.q: How long until the first results?
items.a: The first snapshot runs in ~30 seconds after brand creation. Claude Haiku recommendations arrive ~10 seconds later. Continuous monitoring starts immediately. Subsequent snapshots run on your plan's cadence (monthly for Free, weekly for Solo+).

We parse LLM responses to detect (1) your brand's official name, (2) the name derived from the main domain, (3) numbered rankings to compute average rank, (4) competitors you've configured, (5) URLs cited as sources. Detection is case-insensitive with strict word-boundary (BNP Paribas is detected, BNP isn't confused with BNP Real Estate).

After each snapshot, Claude Haiku 4.5 analyzes your aggregated results (visibility score, top 8 competitors, top 10 authority sources) and proposes 3 to 5 prioritized actions. Categories: (a) authority_source — media/analysts to target with PR, (b) content_gap — topics to publish on, (c) competitor_threat — rising competitors, (d) positioning — editorial repositioning. Each reco comes with a priority (high/medium/low) and a 2-4 sentence body.

On every new snapshot, we compare with the previous one and trigger alerts if: average rank changes by >2 positions (rank_drop/rank_gain), citation rate varies by >20 points (citation_loss/citation_gain), a competitor becomes visible (>30% of prompts) for the first time (competitor_overtake), 3+ new authority sources appear (new_source). Alerts go via email on Solo+ plans only.
v1 supported French only. Since S28, the site is bilingual FR + EN with a Header switch. Prompts generate results in the target market's language. For custom English prompts, contact us.

items.q: What's the difference between Free and Starter?
items.a: Free: 1 brand, 1 LLM (GPT-4o), 30 prompts, monthly snapshot, free forever, no card. Starter (€79/month): 1 brand, 4 LLMs (GPT-4o, Claude Sonnet, Gemini Pro, Perplexity), 50 prompts, weekly snapshot, email alerts. Free validates the value; Starter adds the weekly cadence and multi-LLM needed for continuous tracking.
Stripe Subscription in EUR with EU VAT auto-calculated. Credit card or SEPA. Monthly auto-renewal. All invoices in the Stripe portal (link from /app/billing).

1-click cancel from the Stripe portal ("Manage subscription" button on /app/billing). Subscription stays active until end of paid period, then auto-switches to Free. No pro-rata refund on the current month, but no commitment.

For transparency: a Solo snapshot (4 LLM × 30 prompts = 120 calls) costs ~€5 in cumulative OpenRouter fees. At €149/month with ~€25/month cost (1 weekly snapshot), gross margin is ~83%. Margin drops on Pro/Agency (multi-brand) but stays >70%. No hidden surcharges — billed by plan, not by call.

items.q: What data is stored and where?
items.a: Everything is hosted on Supabase Frankfurt (EU region). We store: your profile (email, name, company), your brands, snapshots and raw LLM responses (including prompts). No third-party personal data is intentionally collected. OpenRouter payloads contain model identifiers but no user tokens. Postgres RLS guarantees no client sees another's data.

Supabase (DB and auth, Frankfurt EU), Vercel (frontend hosting, multi-region), OpenRouter (LLM gateway, US — prompt flow only), Stripe (payments, IE), Resend (transactional emails, US — addresses + subjects only). Full list and DPA links on /privacy.

Geoperf is edited by Jourdechance SAS (SIREN 838 114 619, RCS Nanterre). GDPR compliance: EU data, DPA contract on demand, right-to-be-forgotten implemented (account deletion = CASCADE on all tables). No external advertising pixel on /app/* pages. Full privacy policy on /privacy.

items.q: Are my prompts used for model training?
items.a: No. OpenRouter doesn't reuse prompts to train its own models; underlying providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google) operate in commercial API mode (no training opt-in). Your prompts stay stored on Supabase Frankfurt under your tenant only.

vsGetmint.metaTitle: Geoperf vs GetMint — which choice for your brand?
vsGetmint.metaDescription: Geoperf is the French alternative to GetMint. More accessible (-20% on average), more specialized FR, with an integrated funnel (study → audit → SaaS). Honest comparison.
vsGetmint.ogDescription: French alternative to GetMint for LLM visibility monitoring.
vsGetmint.heroSubtitle: Geoperf is the French alternative to GetMint. More accessible (-20% on average), more specialized for the European Francophone market, with an integrated funnel sector study → consulting audit → recurring SaaS.
vsGetmint.heroDisclaimer: This comparison is written by the Geoperf team. We document our strengths AND the cases where GetMint remains better — no astroturfing.
vsGetmint.reasonsTitle: 3 strong reasons for European Francophone brands.
vsGetmint.tableSourcesBefore: Sources: GetMint public pricing page as of {date} + API documentation + internal Geoperf tests. If a data point is outdated, write us:
vsGetmint.whenGetmintTitle: Honestly: GetMint remains the best choice in 4 cases.
vsGetmint.whenGetmintFooter: Otherwise, for 80% of European Francophone brands, Geoperf is the right choice. That's why we built it.
vsGetmint.ctaFinalTitle: Try Geoperf — free, permanent, no card.
vsGetmint.ctaFinalSubtitle: Free plan forever (1 brand, 1 LLM, monthly snapshot). Upgrade to Starter at €79/month (or €59/month annual — 3 months free) for 4 LLMs and weekly cadence. 1-click cancel.

reasons.title: French specialization
reasons.body: Prompts in FR written by French marketers, sectors mapped on French nomenclature (asset management, retail banking, B2B fintech, health mutuals, etc.). Fine brand-name detection on Francophone variants (BNP Paribas vs BNP Real Estate, AXA vs AXA IM).

reasons.title: Accessible pricing, ~50% cheaper annually
reasons.body: €79/month monthly (vs $99 GetMint), and just €59/month annually thanks to 3 months free (vs ~$79 GetMint with their 20% annual). On the Pro plan: €299/month annual at Geoperf vs ~$399 GetMint. Free plan forever (vs 14-day trial only at GetMint).

reasons.title: Integrated funnel (study → audit → SaaS)
reasons.body: Geoperf is edited by Jourdechance, a GEO consulting firm. We sell a complete journey: free quarterly sector study (lead-magnet) → one-shot €500 consulting audit → recurring SaaS. GetMint sells just the SaaS.

whenGetmintReasons: You're a US/UK enterprise with unlimited budget and need the full GetMint ecosystem.
You need the 150k+ media indexed Publisher Network (our roadmap: Q3 26).
You want a 100% English UI and your teams don't read French.
You already have US-friendly DPA contracts and EU hosting isn't a constraint.
